measurement_note: Size is n, the input string length. Every six-character block contains plain text followed by a recognized entity, exercising both parser branches. The 6000/24000/96000 tiers span 16x within the source limit. A single left-to-right scan takes O(n) time; a correct implementation that redundantly rescans its complete accumulated output after each emitted character takes O(n^2) time and completes normally.
